message:
fix: resolve 10 state, data, and edge-case bugs (#5449)

- #5439: Reconcile global cluster filters when clusters are removed
- #5440: Stop counting explicitly-unhealthy clusters as healthy
- #5441: Re-apply drilldown config when props change (NamespaceEvents)
- #5442: Reset pagination when global filters change
- #5443: Respect zero-valued metrics instead of keeping stale cache
- #5444: Allow authoritative reachable=false to update cache
- #5445: Treat zero-replica workloads as valid deployment completion
- #5446: Track consecutive status failures and transition to failed
- #5447: Parse OCI image refs correctly for registries with ports
- #5448: Cap demo session IDs and validate length to limit abuse

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
